list_info.備註: 校外實習課程(依系上提供名單加選)。

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 專業實習 (Internship)	開課班級 : 應英四年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 劉素勲	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This class offers students the opportunities to apply what they learn in school to actual business settings. Through the internship, students will to get to know more about the practical business world, acquiring knowledge and related skills, such as how to deal with customers and so on. Along with feedbacks from their employers, this project would be helpful for students’ future career planning. 


2.教學綱要
Students practice the knowledge of business at business settings. 


3.教科書

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations by the adviser as well as the emploers assigned will account for 50% of the final grade, respectively.
